detectors.description:
Reentrancy in GBA._transfer(address,address,uint256) (GBA.sol#463-525):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (GBA.sol#507)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (GBA.sol#539-551)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (GBA.sol#513)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (GBA.sol#589)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (GBA.sol#523)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (GBA.sol#677)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (GBA.sol#657)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (GBA.sol#659)
	GBA._rOwned (GBA.sol#265) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GBA._takeTeam(uint256) (GBA.sol#671-679)
	- GBA._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (GBA.sol#653-667)
	- GBA.balanceOf(address) (GBA.sol#381-385)
	- GBA.constructor() (GBA.sol#331-345)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (GBA.sol#523)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (GBA.sol#685)
	GBA._rTotal (GBA.sol#281) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GBA._getCurrentSupply() (GBA.sol#777-787)
	- GBA._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (GBA.sol#683-689)
	- GBA.constructor() (GBA.sol#331-345)
	- GBA.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (GBA.sol#437-445)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in GBA.openTrading() (GBA.sol#595-621):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (GBA.sol#605)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (GBA.sol#607)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (GBA.sol#607)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (GBA.sol#617)
	GBA.tradingOpen (GBA.sol#305) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- GBA.openTrading() (GBA.sol#595-621)

detectors.description: GBA.openTrading() (GBA.sol#595-621) ignores return value by uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (GBA.sol#607)
GBA.openTrading() (GBA.sol#595-621) ignores return value by IERC20(uniswapV2Pair).approve(address(uniswapV2Router),type()(uint256).max) (GBA.sol#619)

	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.4 (GBA.sol#45)
